name: honeycomb-family-mobile
description: iOS and Android wrapper for the Honeycomb Family Dashboard

scripts.build:ios: npm run sync && cap build ios
scripts.build:android: npm run sync && cap build android
scripts.build:android:release: npm run check && npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.open:ios: npm run sync && cap open ios
scripts.open:android: npm run sync && cap open android
scripts.lint: eslint honeycomb.js login-theme.js modules scripts test
scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json capacitor.config.json scripts test eslint.config.mjs
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm test
